records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/ <?/ with two breathing apertures; di- = di`s- twice + <?/ breath.]

defs: A group of ganoid fishes, including the living genera Ceratodus and Lepidosiren, which present the closest approximation to the Amphibia. The air bladder acts as a lung, and the nostrils open inside the mouth. See Ceratodus, and Illustration in Appendix.
